Quality Education.reason: Focus on research methods supports Target 4.7 ('knowledge and skills for sustainable development').
evidence: 學習到做研究的基本功

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and imparts relevant skills for future careers (Target 4.4), fulfilling core educational goals.
evidence: 這是研究生初階(即第一門)研究方法的課程

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides advanced research skills, laying a foundation for productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5) by preparing students for professional and academic careers.
evidence: 奠定未來撰寫學位論文的基礎
學生能夠應用研究方法的知識來評估資訊與分析現象

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances 'scientific research' and encourages 'innovation' (Target 9.5) by teaching students how to 'design their own research proposals' and conduct social science research.

何謂研究、研究的種類、如何擬定研究問題

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on '研究倫理' (Research ethics) supports accountable practices (Target 16.6) and the ability to critically 'evaluate information' (Target 16.10).
evidence: 學生能夠應用研究方法的知識來評估資訊與分析現象

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is a form of capacity-building (Target 17.9) that teaches skills for data collection and analysis, contributing to the availability of reliable data (Target 17.18).
evidence: 大數據的分析與可視化
